d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Velara summons [[4]] dormant magic circles on the battlefield. Each circle awakens after accumulating [[1000]] Energy. When a circle awakens, it affects all units within 2 tiles, restoring [[40%]]<ATK> HP to allies and reducing enemies' Haste by [[30]].
Active. Velara channels her Energy into one of her dormant circles until it awakens. If all circles are already awakened, she instead expands their area of effect to cover the entire battlefield and transfers [[30%]] of [[basic stats]] from all enemies, then evenly distributing them among all allied units, lasting for [[10]]s. The transferred stats that each ally receives cannot exceed [[45%]] of Velara's starting stats. In boss fights, allies will always receive the maximum amount of transferred stats.
Awakened magic circle restores [[50%]]<ATK> HP to allies and reduces enemies' Haste by [[35]].
Awakened magic circle restores [[60%]]<ATK> HP to allies and reduces enemies' Haste by [[40]].
Awakened magic circle restores [[70%]]<ATK> HP to allies and reduces enemies' Haste by [[45]].
Awakened magic circle restores [[80%]]<ATK> HP to allies and reduces enemies' Haste by [[50]].

Velara [[immobilizes]] the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt, reducing their Haste by [[50]] and their Phys & Magic DEF by [[45%]] for [[5]]s. Each awakened magic circle extends this duration by [[0.5]]s.
Increases the Haste reduction to [[55]], and Phys & Magic DEF reduction to [[50%]].
Increases the Haste reduction to [[60]], and Phys & Magic DEF reduction to [[55%]].
Increases the Haste reduction to [[70]], and Phys & Magic DEF reduction to [[60%]].

If Velara is placed within a magic circle when a battle starts, that circle is immediately awakened. Otherwise, the circle farthest from her position is awakened instead.
Passive. Every [[3]]s, each magic circle gains Energy based on the stat reduction debuffs on enemies within 2 tiles. For each unique ally who inflicted any of those debuffs, the circle gains [[24]] Energy.
Increases the Energy gained from each debuff to [[26]].
Increases the Energy gained from each debuff to [[28]].
Increases the Energy gained from each debuff to [[32]].
Velara increases her Haste by [[12]] during battle. When all her magic circles are awakened, her Haste is increased by an extra [[3]].
Velara increases her Haste by [[15]] during battle. When all her magic circles are awakened, her Haste is increased by an extra [[4]].
Velara increases her Haste by [[18]] during battle. When all her magic circles are awakened, her Haste is increased by an extra [[5]].

When a magic circle awakens, it fires a mystic bolt to the [[weakest]] unit within 2 tiles. If the unit is an ally, they gain a [[500%]]<ATK> shield for [[8]]s; if it's an enemy, they take [[300%]]<ATK> damage.
Each awakened magic circle increases the shield value applied or damage dealt by this skill by [[10%]].
Increases the shield value granted by Graceful Edict to [[550%]]<ATK> and the damage it deals to [[350%]].
Every [[10]]s during battle, each awakened magic circle fires a mystic bolt at the [[weakest]] unit on the battlefield.
Increases the shield value granted by Graceful Edict to [[600%]]<ATK> and the damage it deals to [[400%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: After all magic circles are awakened, casting Ruthless Rite expands their area of effect to cover the entire battlefield until the battle ends. Each subsequent cast makes allied units [[unaffected]] and increases their damage dealt by [[5%]] for [[5]]s.
